description: An unassembled OpenVSP model of a transport jet has lost its component hierarchy and positioning. Open the model at `/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ecrm_unlinked.vsp3`. Read the assembly instructions at `/home/ga/Desktop/assembly_instructions.txt`. Establish the correct parent-child relationships using the XForm tab (do not rename components). Set the Wing's Parent to the Fuselage and its relative X Location to 13.5 m. Set the Vertical Tail's Parent to the Fuselage and its relative X Location to 35.0 m. Set the Horizontal Tail's Parent to the Vertical Tail, its relative X Location to 2.0 m, and its relative Z Location to 5.0 m. Save the assembled model to `/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/assembled_jet.vsp3`.
